docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARLOS FRIAS, SON FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIAS, MOISES
DECLARATION UPDATING THE CORRECT NAME OF DEFENDANT TO BE PATRICK I. MORA DBA MORA ARCHITECTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I. DBA MORA ARCHITECTS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIAS, MOISES AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I. DBA MORA ARCHITECTS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,951.00 FILED BY FRIAS, MOISES AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, PATRICK I. DBA MORA ARCHITECTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-22-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2022 - CONTINUED ONT THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO FEB-22-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF MOSIES FRIAS TO BE PRESENT AT THE NEXT TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF MOISES FRIAS, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS FRIAS, PLAINTIFF'S SON, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK MORA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. COURT DOES NOT ALLOW CARLOS FRIAS TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER IS REQUESTED FOR PLAINTIFF. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
